class.name: arm_controllers/ManualArmCylindricalController
class.description: Cylindrical velocity manual ros2 controller for athena arm.

class.name: arm_controllers/ManualArmJointByJointController
class.description: Joint by joint manual ros2 controller for athena arm.

class.name: arm_controllers/AutonomousTypingController
class.description: Autonomous typing controller for athena arm - enables programmatic keyboard typing.
